patches.hypothesis: The refined fix addresses the hardcoded values and lack of edge case handling by replacing them with more generalizable solutions. The patch also adds edge case handling for other input types and includes additional testing to ensure no breakage of other functionality.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug was caused by the lack of a null check when the input is zero. This caused the method to return NaN instead of INF.

patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by the incorrect handling of the case where the real and imaginary parts of the complex number are both zero. In this case, the method should return Complex.INF, but it is actually returning NaN due to the incorrect use of the 'imaginary' variable.
